cleavage agent: Data were searched for peptides with tryptic specificity
collision energy: using a normalized collision energy of 30%
fragmentation method: MS/MS scans were performed using HCD fragmentation
instrument: Peptides were analyzed with an Orbitrap Exploris 480 hybrid quadrupole-Orbitrap mass spectrometer
ionization type: Peptides were electrosprayed through a nanospray emitter tip
labeling: Peptides were analyzed with an Orbitrap Exploris 480 hybrid quadrupole-Orbitrap mass spectrometer coupled to an UltiMate 3000 RSLCnano liquid chromatography system
